scripts.architecture: depcruise core/src services/identity/src services/context/src services/memory/src services/knowledge/src services/reasoning/src services/bootstrap/src --config .dependency-cruiser.cjs && node tools/verify-forbidden-core-dependency.mjs && node tools/verify-forbidden-identity-dependencies.mjs && node tools/verify-forbidden-context-dependencies.mjs && node tools/verify-forbidden-memory-dependencies.mjs && node tools/verify-forbidden-knowledge-dependencies.mjs && node tools/verify-forbidden-reasoning-dependencies.mjs
scripts.format: prettier --write package.json pnpm-workspace.yaml tsconfig.json tsconfig.base.json vitest.config.ts eslint.config.mjs .dependency-cruiser.cjs .github/workflows/validate.yml core services tools IMPLEMENTATION-M0.md IMPLEMENTATION-M1.md IMPLEMENTATION-M2.md IMPLEMENTATION-M3.md IMPLEMENTATION-M4.md IMPLEMENTATION-M5.md
scripts.format:check: prettier --check package.json pnpm-workspace.yaml tsconfig.json tsconfig.base.json vitest.config.ts eslint.config.mjs .dependency-cruiser.cjs .github/workflows/validate.yml core services tools IMPLEMENTATION-M0.md IMPLEMENTATION-M1.md IMPLEMENTATION-M2.md IMPLEMENTATION-M3.md IMPLEMENTATION-M4.md IMPLEMENTATION-M5.md
scripts.typecheck: tsc -b --pretty false && tsc -p core/tsconfig.test.json --pretty false && tsc -p services/identity/tsconfig.test.json --pretty false && tsc -p services/context/tsconfig.test.json --pretty false && tsc -p services/memory/tsconfig.test.json --pretty false && tsc -p services/knowledge/tsconfig.test.json --pretty false && tsc -p services/reasoning/tsconfig.test.json --pretty false && tsc -p services/bootstrap/tsconfig.test.json --pretty false
scripts.validate: pnpm format:check && pnpm lint && pnpm typecheck && pnpm test && pnpm architecture && pnpm diagnostic:run
